name: New Orleans Pralines
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed brown sugar, light or dark
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, butter, and boiling water in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a full boil.
3. Once at a full boil, continue cooking for one minute.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the pecans and vanilla extract.
5. Beat the mixture for two minutes until it begins to crystallize on the side of the pan.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper or foil.
7. Work quickly before the pralines set.
8. Wrap each praline individually in foil or plastic wrap and store in a covered container.
9. Yields approximately two dozen pralines.
